report.header: 注:1-信用卡查询日期是发卡日；2-第三方存管、手机银行、网银、钱来丰查询日期是签约日

select.value:
Select A.TXN_DT ,A.CST_ID ,A.CST_NM ,A.SALE_ID ,A.BONUS_TYPE_ID ,A.BONUS_TYPE_NM ,A.ORG_ID ,D.ORG_NM ,A.BRANCH_ORG_ID ,D.BRANCH_ORG_NM ,A.CCY_ID ,B.NM AS CCY_NM ,cast(A.AMT as dec(18,0)) as AMT ,A.RECOMMEND_PEOPLE ,A.RECOMMEND_PEOPLE_NM ,A.RECOMMEND_RATIO ,A.RECOMMEND_BONUS ,A.SALES_PEOPLE ,A.SALES_PEOPLE_NM ,A.SALE_PROD_STATUS_NM ,A.SALES_RATIO ,A.SALES_BONUS ,A.CHANNLE_ID ,C.CHANNLE_NM ,A.TERM_DAY_CNT ,trim(A.BONUS_STATUS_ID) as BONUS_STATUS_ID ,A.BONUS_STATUS_NM ,A.BONUS_EFF_DT ,'0' as SUM from IBS.T2_BONUS_DETAIL A LEFT JOIN PUB.CL B ON A.CCY_ID=B.CL_ID LEFT JOIN IBS.T9_CHANNEL C ON A.CHANNLE_ID=C.CHANNLE_ID LEFT JOIN IBS.T5_ORG D ON A.ORG_ID=D.ORG_ID AND D.ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' AND D.ORG_LEVEL_ID='1' where {#condition#}
order by TXN_DT desc
